purpose: Record PR-132 C-rank recheck for Harness Australia. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: Official Harness Australia route was rechecked, but a complete no-login June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table was not captured.
Official Fields route is present, but captured output redirects to a JavaScript/Cookie-dependent page and does not expose complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Official Meeting Calendar route is present, but captured output redirects to a JavaScript/Cookie-dependent page and does not expose complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
Legacy route was rechecked, but complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were not captured.

supporting_navigation: Harness Australia site navigation exposes state links for NSW, QLD, SA, TAS, VIC, and WA.
Harness Australia site navigation exposes Racing links including Fields, Results, Meeting Calendar, Feature Races, and Tracks.

promotion_status.reason: Harness Australia is not promoted to C-rank manual records because no captured official or accepted route currently provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.

regeneration_method.current: Re-check Harness Australia official racing routes and legacy route. Use state harness authority routes only if they expose complete month rows.
regeneration_method.missing_for_promotion: A no-login month-capable official or accepted route that exposes complete June 2026 harness meeting_date + racecourse rows.

next_update_steps: Use browser/devtools or Codex network inspection for Harness Australia Meeting Calendar requests and date/month parameters.
Inspect state harness authority sites linked from Harness Australia for June 2026 month calendars or downloadable race-date exports.
Do not promote current-day fields pages, short-window results, or JS/Cookie redirect shells as full-month C-rank calendar records.
Promote only after every row has meeting_date, racecourse, source_url, parser, last_checked, and a documented regeneration method.
